ContractItemSchema.description: Schema for an item within a contract.
ContractItemSchema.title: ContractItemSchema

ErrorDetail.description:
The FastAPI HTTPException / JSONResponse error body shape ({"detail": ...}),
declared so the login/callback 400 and 503 responses carry their real JSON
body in the OpenAPI contract instead of an empty one.
ErrorDetail.title: ErrorDetail

items.description: List of items for the current page
items.title: Items

items.description: List of items for the current page
items.title: Items

SavedSearchParameters.description:
Server-side validation model for a saved search's stored filter blob. Mirrors the
frontend ContractSearch shape minus `page`; extra="forbid" rejects the inert ME/TE params
(FASTAPI-2), the wire-only `is_ship_contract`, `page`, and arbitrary junk (design §4.5).
SavedSearchParameters.title: SavedSearchParameters

SortableContractFields.description: Fields that can be used for sorting contracts.
SortableContractFields.title: SortableContractFields

WatchlistItemCreate.description: Add-watchlist body: exactly one of type_id / type_name, plus optional max_price / notes.
WatchlistItemCreate.title: WatchlistItemCreate

WatchlistItemUpdate.description: Partial update: omitted field preserves, explicit JSON null clears (via model_fields_set).
WatchlistItemUpdate.title: WatchlistItemUpdate

info.description: API for the Hangar Bay application, providing access to EVE Online public contract data and related services.
info.title: Hangar Bay API

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of contracts based on specified filters.

This endpoint uses a service layer to apply advanced filtering, sorting,
and pagination to public contracts.

parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across contract title and ship name.
parameters.name: search

schema.description: Case-insensitive search across contract title and ship name.
schema.title: Search
